header.title: Notifications
header.description: Review survey assignments, approaching deadlines, and onboarding review updates.

surveyPublished.title: New survey available
surveyPublished.message: A new survey has been assigned to you. Please review it and submit your response before the deadline.

surveyDeadlineReminder.title: Survey deadline reminder
surveyDeadlineReminder.message: A survey assigned to you is approaching its deadline. Complete it as soon as possible.

onboardingApproved.title: Profile approved
onboardingApproved.message: Your onboarding documents have been approved. You can continue using the student workspace normally.

onboardingRejected.title: Profile needs updates
onboardingRejected.message: Your onboarding documents need to be revised. Please review the feedback and upload the required files again.

empty.title: No notifications
empty.description: Survey and onboarding updates will appear here when they become relevant.

errors.markRead: Unable to mark notification as read.
errors.markAllRead: Unable to mark notifications as read.
